Video.summary: Convict love stories! It's Jerry's jailbird special and he's got two sexy prisoners of love and one mini feisty officer to help keep the inmates in order.
Video.title: Back Off My Jailbird Lover!

Video.summary: CeCe is here to tell her girlfriend, Michelle, that she is cheating with PJ who's a man! Next Silas is here to tell his girlfriend that he's been cheating with her best friend! Then Mark recently caught his fiance, Liz, in bed with her lover, Angie!
Video.title: Hot Sex Secrets!

Video.summary: Fefe confronts the strippers with whom her boyfriend had a threesome; stripper Monet teaches her competitive new co-worker a lesson by sleeping with her boyfriend; Cayenne meets a dancer he follows on Instagram.
Video.title: Stripnotized

Video.summary: A woman sleeps with her brother; a woman leaves her controlling husband; a woman sleeps with her husband's sister; a man impregnates his mistress.
Video.title: My Brother Is My Lover

Video.summary: Laharla caught her mother's boyfriend Victor cheating when she saw him through their window. Then, Aaron claims that a woman named Olivia will not leave him alone after they met in person.
Video.title: I Saw You Through The Window

Image.alt: I Saw You Through The Window
I Saw You Through The Window
I Saw You Through The Window

Video.summary: Heather is 17 years old and she says her boyfriend Anthony is the father of her child. But Anthony thinks his brother, Tracy is the father. Then, Roxana believes her two-year-old nephew was beaten by his mother Kyesha.
Video.title: Did He Abuse My Son?

Video.summary: Roberta suspects that her husband Bryan has been cheating. Find out whether these men are really the father!
Video.title: DNA: Don't Run From the Results

Image.alt: DNA: Don't Run From the Results
DNA: Don't Run From the Results
DNA: Don't Run From the Results

Video.summary: Police informed Latoya that her husband was accused of molesting her daughter. She immediately kicked him out, but feels torn. Then, Jesenia suspects her ex Melvin molested their daughter, but Melvin maintains his innocence!
Video.title: If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough

Image.alt: If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough
If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough
If He Fails, This Stage Won't Be Enough

Video.summary: Gloria thinks her sister's apparent drug-overdose death was not an accident, and that her other sister may be responsible.
Video.title: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Image.alt: Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?
Did You Party With Our Sister and Leave Her to Die?

Video.summary: A woman tells her bounty-hunter husband that she is cheating with a stripper, who turns out to be gay; a woman finds out about her boyfriend's secret lover.
Video.title: A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper

Image.alt: A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper
A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper
A Bounty Hunter and a Gay Stripper

Video.summary: Linda says her ex-best friend is trying to steal her man! Sherry wants her boyfriend's wife and family gone!
Video.title: Homewreckers Confronted

Video.summary: Rochelle confronts the 'other woman'. Liz ruins her manís relationship with another woman... whoís pregnant!
Video.title: I'll Fight For My Man

Video.summary: Damon confesses his affair. Johnís never been a ďone-woman-manĒ. Dee wants to confront his exís new boyfriend.
Video.title: Bizarre Betrayals

Video.summary: Kenny reveals that he cheated. Scott says heís losing his one true love. Jason tries to win back his ex love.
Video.title: Betrayed By My First Love

Video.summary: Beba is here to confront her cousin for stealing her man.
Video.title: Wedding Day Disasters!

Video.summary: Today Mark will be forced to choose between his lover, Amy, and his wife.
Video.title: Torn Between Two Lovers

Video.summary: Hope confronts her bestie for betraying her! John slept with his girlfriend's best friend and isn't at fault!
Video.title: Angry Lovers Blow Up!

Video.summary: Craig wants the best for his niece, Krysti, and feels her boyfriend, Randy, isn't right for her. Next Teresa plans to raise her child in the KKK and her fiance, a former Klan member, is here to talk some sense into her.
Video.title: Battle Of The Wounded Lovers!

Video.summary: Justin says that Ashley's so overbearing and protective that it drove him to cheat on her with her lifelong friend Erica. Then, Tina is here to confront her sister Ruthie for cheating with her man Tony.
Video.title: Crazy In Love

Video.summary: John weighs almost 700 pounds and couldn't be happier. HIs girlfriend Kim goes so far as to make him choose between her and a 10-foot long sandwich! He chooses the sandwich.
Video.title: A Man and His Food: A Love Story!

Image.alt: A Man and His Food: A Love Story!
A Man and His Food: A Love Story!
A Man and His Food: A Love Story!

Video.summary: Anita is ready to dump her husband for her ex-lover. Next Theresa is cheating on her fiancť with his brother! Later Kevin is here to ell his girlfriend's ex, Jermaine, to back off.
Video.title: It's Your Fault I'm Cheating!

Video.summary: Selina recently met Lee at the mall and while their love has blossomed, she's got a serious secret - she's really a man! Then D's visits to the local pool have gotten him into hot water after sleeping with the lifeguard.
Video.title: Transsexual Takedown

Video.summary: Katie says her boyfriend, Brandon, is addicted to porn and has caught him sending dirty letters to other women including her mother! Then, 6 months into dating Crosby, Dayana cheated on him and now, he wants to know if their child is his!
Video.title: You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?

Image.alt: You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?
You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?
You Wrote Dirty Letters to Her Mom?

Video.summary: At 12, Crystal dated 20 year old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months in prison for criminal sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Are they a product of inappropriate love or just misunderstood?
Video.title: 22-Year-Old Marries 14-Year-Old Girl

Video.summary: Ashley believes her husband Michael may have molested their 3 year old son. Michael says she is making up this entire story so she can divorce him. Next, Anjail believes Dwight has been physically abusing their son.
Video.title: He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends

Image.alt: He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends
He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends
He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends

Video.summary: Loretta and Joseph have been together for 2 years and have a young son together. She says that when she was pregnant, he punched and pulled her hair. She claims that sheís been faithful but Joseph isnít convinced. Whoís telling the truth?
Video.title: Abuse, Prostitution, DNA...And A Retest

Video.summary: In order to avoid charges, Christi abandons her ten year old daughter and leaves the state. Her daughter wants to give her one last chance to take responsibility and be in her life.
Video.title: Mommy, Go To Jail For Me

Image.alt: Mommy, Go To Jail For Me
Mommy, Go To Jail For Me
Mommy, Go To Jail For Me

Video.summary: Elisha is claiming to be pregnant with John's baby, but Elisha's friend Brittany claims that she made up the pregnancy to keep John from breaking up with her. Then, during her pregnancy, Linzy contracted an STD and believes that Alex gave it to her.
Video.title: She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap

Image.alt: She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap
She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap
She's Not Pregnant, It's A Trap

Video.summary: Jesus is worried that Sonja is sleeping with other men in exchange for Cocaine. Then, Jessica is desperate to change Josh's controlling and abusive ways. She says she can no longer live with Josh if he's going to continue threatening her and accusing her of prostitution.
Video.title: Is My Wife A Prostitute

Video.summary: Is it love, or fiction? 20-year-old Nick is desperate to get the love of his life back after one magical night of passion. Nick believes he's always been meant to be with Megan, even though he's only known her for 5 months. Megan however tells a very different tale, where Nick is imagining all the fate and passion between them. She claims they hardly know each other, and they've surely never slept together. Steve's not sure who's telling the truth, but the lie detector will yield the final results.
Video.title: Did We Have Sex?

Video.summary: Talia believes her husbandís friend Tray is a peeping Tom. Whoís telling the truth?
Video.title: Steve, She's Stalking Me!

Video.summary: Miracle believes that her husband, Will, is cheating on her.
Video.title: You Came On The Show, Don't Run Now!

Image.alt: You Came On The Show, Don't Run Now!
You Came On The Show, Don't Run Now!
You Came On The Show, Don't Run Now!

Video.summary: Michael learns that his brother had an affair with his fiancee and may be the father of her son.
Video.title: Long Lost Brother Stole My Family

Image.alt: Long Lost Brother Stole My Family
Long Lost Brother Stole My Family
Long Lost Brother Stole My Family
